title: 🚀 Communications Section Setup
description:
Build Twilio-powered communications section with voice calls and SMS.

**Credentials needed from Jeremy:**
• Twilio Account SID
• Twilio Auth Token
• Twilio Phone Number(s)
• Supabase URL + Keys (anon + service role)
• NocoDB connection details

**Features to build:**
• Dialpad for outbound/inbound voice calls
• SMS inbox with conversation threads
• Bulk SMS sender with templates
• Call/message history in Supabase
